steps.title: Find the pasture share
steps.content:
Cropland is $44.0\%$ of the tract, so pasture is the remaining percent.
$$100\%-44.0\%=56.0\%$$

steps.title: Find building coverage
steps.content:
Buildings cover $22.5\%$ of the cropland and $15.0\%$ of the pasture. As percents of the whole tract, those are:
$$0.225\cdot44.0=9.9$$
$$0.150\cdot56.0=8.4$$

steps.title: Add the two parts
steps.content:
Add the two percentages of the whole tract.
$$9.9+8.4=18.3$$
The answer is 18.3.
